title: Potato Logistics
description: Logistics and automation mod for Better Than Adventure
body:
A mod for logistics and automation for Better than Adventure

Inspired by mods like buildcraft and project red, with potato logistics you can automate now automate your contraptions in better than adventure.

![pipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/361998a4ead0753a0a96b47b6d3ff213fa5489ab.png)
